title: <div>I love you. I love having you in my life. I want you to be happy and find j
content:
I love you. I love having you in my life. I want you to be happy and find joy in life, whatever that might be. If you don't want to work or if you do, I can support us. I will support you through whatever changes you want to make in your life. I believe we can be together for a while. Travel together. Keep changing together—all of that. But you have to want that, too, because I can only give you so much without feeling validated.

To feel valued, I need affection, touch, and love. With that, I don’t mind being the one who works. And I only want that from you. And when I couldn’t get it from you in the past, I needed to go elsewhere. Eventually, someone will come into my life, and we will live together because that's what I'm ultimately seeking. I don't mean it like a threat. It’s just that I want to be loved by the person I love.

Maybe we’re not compatible in some ways, or maybe you can’t love me like i want or need…that’s okay, i’m not writing this to you as an offer or an ultimatum. I wanted you to know where my head is at.
context: From document: I love you. I love having you in my life. I want you to be happy and…
